allow: Bash(git add lib/constants.ts && git commit -m "fix sitemap URL and add article pages" && git push)
Bash(git add content/security/essential-guide.mdx && git commit -m "feat: add real security guide content with CVE-2026-25253 and 5 risks" && git push)

Bash(git add content/install/macos.mdx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
add macos install guide with screenshots

Complete 13-step macOS installation tutorial in Cantonese covering:
- clawdbot uninstall and openclaw fresh install
- Onboarding flow with QuickStart and Full Reset
- OpenAI Codex OAuth + GPT-5.4 model setup
- Telegram Bot creation and pairing
- Post-install security verification steps
- FAQ: Anthropic ToS warning, migration from clawdbot, cost, Windows
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add content/troubleshoot/gateway.mdx && git commit -m "add gateway troubleshooting guide")
Bash(git add content/compare/vs-chatgpt.mdx && git commit -m "add openclaw vs chatgpt comparison" && git push)
Bash(git add content/troubleshoot/token-optimization.mdx && git commit -m "add token optimization guide" && git push)
Bash(git add content/skills/essential-setup.mdx && git commit -m "add skills recommendation guide" && git push)
Bash(git add content/install/api-keys.mdx && git commit -m "add api key setup guide" && git push)
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "batch: add 8 new articles" && git push)
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "batch: add 10 use-case and skills articles" && git push)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add affiliate banners, digital products section, and resources page

- Add AffiliateBanner component \(digitalocean, openrouter, mac-mini\)
- Add DigitalProducts section to homepage
- Add /resources/tools static page
- Insert affiliate banners into 7 MDX articles at contextual positions
- Export AffiliateBanner in mdx-components.tsx
- Add 推薦工具 link to footer
EOF
\)")
